title: chore(packages,scripts): remove dead components and scripts, unify drifted lists
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes 6 unused BYOP widgets + dead `./auth/sdk` / `./wallet/sdk` subpath exports from @pollinations/ui (~140 lines; alpha-only surface, bumped to 0.1.0-alpha.1)
- Removes @pollinations/sdk `./client` alias (byte-identical to root, #11610); dedupes the diverged HTTP error parser between client and react hooks; stops the catalog silently dropping unknown model categories (5.1.0-alpha.1 + CHANGELOG)
- Extracts one APPS.md parser for the 6 .github/scripts consumers — header-name lookup fixes app-check-duplicate's silently broken repo/author matching (fields shifted by the Platform column); regen parity verified byte-identical (808/808 rows)
- Deletes dead scripts: pr_comment_review.py (806 lines, workflow gone since #6870), backfill.py (653), app-update-readme.js (duplicate of greenhouse updateRootReadme), social format_pr_summary/add_pr_comment
- Removes lefthook (config 100% commented out) and unread ALLOW_ANONYMOUS_USAGE vars from gen wrangler.toml; syncs MCP voice fallback list (was missing amuch, dan)

Not included: enter.pollinations.ai/wrangler.toml ALLOW_ANONYMOUS_USAGE lines (sibling PR owns that file), dashboard/frontend model-category copies (owned by open PRs), useApps.ts browser parser copy (different runtime).

Note: root package-lock.json regenerated (lefthook removal) — may conflict with sibling cleanup PRs #11754/#11752; regenerate on rebase.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Sweeping out the dead leaves
gist.blurb: We did some spring cleaning! Removed thousands of lines of dead code, unified our scripts, and made the codebase a little lighter.
gist.summary: Removed over 1,500 lines of dead code and unused scripts while unifying the APPS.md parser and HTTP error handling across the SDK.
gist.impact: This reduces technical debt, ensures GitHub Actions correctly parse app submissions, and provides consistent error responses in the React hooks.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee sweeping up dead leaves and old floppy disks with a tiny broom. A chunky robot holding a trash bin. Clean, organized garden.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny maid headband, sweeping up dead leaves and old floppy disks with a small broom. A chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head holds a lime green (#ecf874) recycling bin. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, chunky sprites.
